content.text:
Here is the complete analysis.

---

## Files Found

### All .ts files with sizes

| Path | Size |
|---|---|
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/scope-guard.ts` | 3.1K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/token-saver.ts` | 14K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/lint-guard.ts` | 13K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/index.ts` | 4.0K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/types.ts` | 2.1K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/delegate-tool.ts` | 8.8K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/subagent-runner.ts` | 8.5K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/plan-panel.ts` | 11K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/activity-feed.ts` | 14K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/commands.ts` | 1.2K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/specialists.ts` | 5.9K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/debug.ts` | 701B |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/ui-utils.ts` | 1.5K |
| `/Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/legacy/orchestrator.ts` | 57K |

**Total: 14 .ts files** across 3 directories (`extensions/`, `orchestrator/`, `orchestrator/legacy/`).  
Empty dirs: `cloakbrowser/`, `subagent/` (no .ts files).

### Entry points read

**Top-level extensions** (self-contained, loaded independently):

1. **`scope-guard.ts`** — Tool-level write enforcement for subagents. Reads `.pi/scope.json`, blocks write/edit tool calls targeting files outside scope. Zero coupling to orchestrator.

2. **`token-saver.ts`** — Token compression. Overrides built-in tools (bash, read, grep, find, ls) to wrap output with compression: ANSI strip, line budgets, read dedup (MD5 fingerprint), blank collapse. Also injects terse-mode system prompts and exports `shortenLabel()` for orchestrator.

3. **`lint-guard.ts`** — Deterministic lint after every edit/write. Auto-detects 14 linters across 7 languages (biome, eslint, tsc, ruff, mypy, flake8, pylint, golangci-lint, go vet, clippy, maven, gradle, rubocop). Cache-safe: sends lint results as separate message via `pi.sendMessage()`, not modifying tool result. Registers `lint` and `typecheck` tools.

**orchestrator/ submodule entry point:**

4. **`orchestrator/index.ts`** — Wiring hub. Guards subagent re-registration (env var check). Registers `before_agent_start` handler (injects delegation system prompt, strips tools to only `delegate`). Registers `tool_call` handler (blocks non-delegate calls). Delegates to `delegate-tool.ts`, `commands.ts`. Generates plan from user prompt, sets up plan panel.

### Key orchestrator submodules

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `types.ts` | Shared interfaces: `OrchestratorStep`, `ActivityFeedState`, `Specialist`, `Scope`, `SubagentContext` |
| `delegate-tool.ts` | Registers the `delegate(specialist, task)` tool. Caches scope from scout output, enforces coder requires prior scope. |
| `subagent-runner.ts` | Creates subagent sessions, manages batch loading, handles scope.json injection |
| `plan-panel.ts` | Plan panel UI (header component with steps/status) |
| `activity-feed.ts` | Activity feed state tracking (steps, substeps, timestamps) |
| `specialists.ts` | Specialist registry (scout, coder, reviewer, researcher, writer) with tool lists and system prompts |
| `commands.ts` | Registers `/plan`, `/resume`, `/caveman` slash commands |
| `debug.ts` | Debug logging utility |
| `ui-utils.ts` | UI helper functions |
| `legacy/orchestrator.ts` | 57K — pre-refactor monolithic version (1663 lines) |

### Dependencies

```
extensions/tsconfig.json
  └─ include: ["orchestrator/**/*.ts"]   # only compiles orchestrator subdir
  └─ paths: @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent, pi-ai, typebox

token-saver.ts
  └─ exports: shortenLabel() → used by orchestrator/index.ts, delegate-tool.ts

scope-guard.ts      → standalone, no imports from other extensions
lint-guard.ts       → standalone, no imports from other extensions

orchestrator/index.ts
  ├─ imports: subagent-runner.ts, plan-panel.ts, token-saver.ts, delegate-tool.ts, commands.ts, debug.ts, specialists.ts
  └─ default export: function(pi: ExtensionAPI)

orchestrator/delegate-tool.ts
  ├─ imports: token-saver.ts, types.ts, specialists.ts, subagent-runner.ts, activity-feed.ts, plan-panel.ts
  └─ imports scope-guard indirectly via subagent-runner (writes scope.json)
```

## Scope

- filesToModify: []
- filesToCreate: []
- changeType: "single-file"
- maxLinesPerFile: 400

## Recommendation

All files read and mapped. No modifications needed — this is an investigation. If you need deeper look at any specific file (subagent-runner.ts, plan-panel.ts, activity-feed.ts, specialists.ts, or legacy/orchestrator.ts), say which.
